## OOM Triage

_Where the reachable heap is concentrated, at a glance._

- **Headline retainer:** `java.util.zip.ZipFile$Source` (a class group) retains 12.3 MB (37.3% of reachable heap).
- **Concentration:** Retention is spread across multiple roots.
- **Shape:** deep (retention flows through long dominator chains — often nested collections or linked structures) — 90% of objects within depth 7, max depth 967.
- **One leak or many:** the single biggest object retains 8.1% and the top 10 retain 43.5% of the heap; 15 object(s) each hold >=1%.
